Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase projectile speed by 20% Reduce power consumption by 10%Asteroids ParticleSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 35%. Increase rate of fire by 10%.Asteroids ParticleSteel x800n/a
3Two bullets are now fired simultaneously (+48% dps). Asteroids ParticleSteel x1600n/a
4Increase rate of fire by 40%. Reduce power consumption by 10%Asteroids ParticleSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 32%. Increase range by 25%.Asteroids ParticleSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase projectile speed by 30%. Three bullets are now fired simultaneously (+100% dps).Asteroids ParticleSteel x12800Iridium x800
